headline: 3 Reasons IP is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Over the last six months, International Paper’s shares have sunk to $33.39, producing a disappointing 14.8% loss - a stark contrast to the S&P 500’s 10.3% gain. This may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
